name: Officer Nikki, Goddess of Law
description: Officer Nikki imposes her unique brand of justice on the tiny people around her. You see, Nikki isn’t like other police officers. For a start, she’s the unexpected result of a desperate experiment and the world’s only giantess. Secondly, she’s not even a cop... she's just a stripper in a sexy uniform! With collateral damage off the charts, nobody is safe.
creator: Penny01
